articles.author: Hugh Langley
articles.title: 'Something has genuinely shifted': Inside Europe's tech startup surge - Business Insider
articles.description: European startups like Legora and Lovable are challenging US tech dominance, driven by AI advancements and better access to VC funding.
articles.content:
Call it Europemaxxing. Call it a Scandinavian surge. Whatever is happening, Europe's tech scene is feeling hot.
From Legora to Lovable, Klarna to Yann LeCunn's new AMI Labs, a new generation of Euro… [+7825 chars]

articles.author: Lucas Ropek
articles.title: Xreal, Google's smartglasses partner, thinks it has finally mastered this notoriously tricky industry - TechCrunch
articles.description: Chi Xu, the founder and CEO of XREAL, thinks the smart glasses business has finally reached a turning point.
articles.content: The smart glasses industry has long been a tortured dream of Silicon Valley. The premise is appealing enough: What if, to enjoy the benefits of mobile computing, people didn’t have to stare at their … [+3614 chars]
